name: Jiffy Fruit Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 1 cup canned peaches; apricots; or fruit cocktail
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine the fruit and juice, tapioca, and cinnamon in a 9-inch pie plate. Set aside.
3. In a small bowl, stir together the biscuit mix and milk until combined.
4. Top the fruit mixture with an equal number of mounds of biscuit dough (about 6).
5. Place the fruit mixture with the biscuits on top of the oven rack.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Serve warm, garnished with additional fruit on top of the biscuit.
Serving size: 1 serving = 170 calories; 3/4 cup fruit; 1/4 cup dairy; Carbs = 27g; Protein = 3g; Fat = 5g
Approved by the Diabetes Association.
